title: Power intelligent agents with AI-native databases
summary: AI-native databases enable intelligent agents with enterprise data through AI-powered search, natural language interfaces, and multimodal queries. The session covers graph retrieval-augmented generation and open standards like Model Context Protocol to provide interconnected context for agents.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech session explains how AI-native databases connect intelligent agents to enterprise data through AI-powered search, natural language interfaces, and multimodal queries. It matters because agents need interconnected context to act on proprietary data rather than general knowledge alone. Key takeaways include the role of graph retrieval-augmented generation in surfacing related context and the use of open standards such as Model Context Protocol to expose that data to agents.
